CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 STRING, str2 STRING);
SELECT id, editdistance2(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, editdistance2(str1, str2) AS distance FROM (SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_strings WHERE id < 4) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.id, t1.str1, t1.str2, editdistance2(t1.str1, t2.str2) AS distance FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id != t2.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE editdistance2(str1, str2) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE editdistance2(str1, 'Example') < 5;
WITH string_pairs AS (SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_strings) SELECT editdistance2(str1, str2) FROM string_pairs WHERE str1 <> str2;
CREATE TABLE example_pairs AS SELECT id, editdistance2(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE id < 5;
